translations.landing.compare.apiTable.note: API-based tools are great for connecting cloud apps through webhooks and APIs. Flyto2 shines when you need to automate what you see on screen — clicking buttons, filling forms, reading pages — with the ability to pause and check at any step.
translations.landing.compare.apiTable.title: Flyto2 vs API-Based Tools
translations.landing.compare.cta.description: Get started for free. No credit card required. See the difference for yourself.
translations.landing.compare.cta.title: Ready to try Flyto2?
translations.landing.compare.hero.description: Different tools solve different problems. Here's where Flyto2 fits — and where it doesn't.
translations.landing.compare.hero.title: How Flyto2 is
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose: Flyto2 is a great fit when...
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose1.desc: You need someone to check before the system acts
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose1.title: Your workflow needs human approval
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose2.desc: Everything runs on your computer, no cloud needed
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose2.title: You want to keep data on your own machine
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose3.desc: Every step is recorded with screenshots and logs
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose3.title: You need a full record of what happened
translations.landing.compare.notRight.choose4.desc: Try one first, check the result, then run the rest

translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip: Flyto2 might not be the best fit when...
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip1.desc: If you need hundreds of machines running at once, enterprise-scale tools may be better suited
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip1.title: You need massive-scale bot farms
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip2.desc: If all your apps already talk to each other through APIs, a simpler connector tool may be enough
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip2.title: You only connect cloud apps together
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip3.desc: Flyto2 is built for human oversight — if you don't need it, there are lighter options
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip3.title: You want fully hands-off automation
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip4.desc: Extending what you already have may be more practical
translations.landing.compare.notRight.skip4.title: You already have automation tools in place
translations.landing.compare.notRight.subtitle: We believe in being upfront. Here's when you might want to look elsewhere.
translations.landing.compare.notRight.title: When Flyto2
translations.landing.compare.rpaTable.note: Traditional enterprise automation platforms are built for large teams with big budgets and dedicated IT support. Flyto2 is built for people and teams who want to get started quickly, stay in control, and keep things simple.
translations.landing.compare.rpaTable.title: Flyto2 vs Traditional Automation Platforms
